name: Wieprzowina w Smietanie (Baked Pork Chops In
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the pork chops on both sides.
2. Fry in butter until browned.
3. Mix vinegar, sugar, water and pour over the chops.
4. Bring mixture to a boil, reduce heat and simmer gently for 1 1/4 hours or until chops are tender.
5. Add sour cream and heat just under boiling point.
